content:
Assertion : For liquid dishwashing non-ionic type of detergent are used.

Reason : Remove grease and oil by micelle formation.

options.content: If both assertion and reason are true and reason is the correct explanation of assertion.
If both assertion and reason are true, but reason is not the correct explanation of assertion.
If assertion is true, but reason is false.
If both assertion and reason are false.

explanation:
Non-ionic detergents have groups at one end of the alkyl chain showing H-bonding include monoesters of polyhydric alcohols or polyethens derived from ethylene oxide. It is used as liquid dishwashing detergent. It remove grease and oil by micelle formation.

Both, assertion and reason are correct and given reason in the correct explanation of the assertion.

content: Food preservatives prevent spoilage of food due to microbial growth. The most commonly used preservatives are
explanation: The chemicals which are used to protect food from microbes action i.e. which arrest the process of fermentation, acidification and any other decomposition of food are known as food preservatives. Table salt, sugar, vegetable oil, vinegar, sodium benzoate $$\left(\mathrm{C}_6 \mathrm{H}_5 \mathrm{COONa}\right)$$, sodium metabisulphite $$\left(\mathrm{Na}_2 \mathrm{S}_2 \mathrm{O}_5\right)$$, vitamin E. etc. are the common example of food preservatives.
